name: Ambulance Rush - Ambulance Driving & Rescue Simulator

reviews.review_description: don't waste your money you won't get a refund complete trash everything glitches you'll be carrying the steering wheel and everything with you i bought this thing as a bundle when they refuse to give a refined do not get this game at all i also took a video and yes this game is complete trash garbage
Please don’t waste your money on this game!

Waste of money bought the game thought it would be good but no. The graphics terrible and for a refund you need to have the game for more than 14 DAYS! And you need to play the game for 2 hours for the refund. Very bad refund policy. The game has no traffic no sounds. 😒
Never buy one of the worst games I’ve ever played
Nice game keep it up. also please add more ambulance and traffic in city.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. Please stay tuned for further updates

reviews.review_description: Can’t do anything after getting to first destination. Maybe add a tutorial

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game! Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us. We’d like to share with you that our game is still in development phase, so you can look forward to more improvements and features in the future. We are also working on adding a tutorial, as requested.

reviews.review_description: Great graphics, nice vehicle physics, this will be an amazing game if the developers continue in this direction. However, it is currently too early and not really playable since you can just drive from a to b and that’s it. I will check back. Keep it up!

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to leave this kind review! We’re glad you’re enjoying the graphics and physics so far. We’re actively developing new features to make the game more dynamic and engaging and we hope to exceed your expectations in the future!
